subject: Fermi GRB190420.98 Global MASTER-Net observations report
submitter: Vladimir Lipunov at Moscow State U/Krylov Obs  <lipunov@xray.sai.msu.ru>
body:
V. Lipunov, E. Gorbovskoy, V.Kornilov, D.Kuvshinov, N.Tyurina, P.Balanutsa,

D. Buckley, S. Potter, A. Kniazev, M. Kotze
South African Astronomical Observatory



MASTER-SAAO robotic telescope  (Global MASTER-Net: http://observ.pereplet.ru, Lipunov et al., 2010, Advances in Astronomy, vol. 2010, 30L)  located in South Africa (South African Astronomical Observatory) started inspect of the Fermi GRB190420.98 ( 21h 17m 09.60s , -66d 24m 36.00s, R=2.04) errorbox  106 sec after trigger time at 2019-04-20 23:34:11 UT, with upper limit up to  16.1 mag. The observations began at zenit distance = 64 deg. The sun  altitude  is -65.8 deg. 

MASTER-OAFA robotic telescope  located in Argentina (OAFA observatory of San Juan National University) started inspect of the Fermi GRB190420.98 errorbox  241 sec after trigger time at 2019-04-20 23:36:26 UT, with upper limit up to  15.6 mag. The observations began at zenit distance = 83 deg. The sun  altitude  is -19.3 deg. 

The galactic latitude b = -60 deg., longitude l = 98 deg.


Real time updated cover map and OT discovered available here: 
https://master.sai.msu.ru/site/master2/observ.php?id=1000093

We obtain a following upper limits.
